title: DriveAgent: Multi-Agent Structured Reasoning With LLM and Multimodal Sensor Fusion for Autonomous Driving

title: SymbolicAI: A framework for logic-based approaches combining generative models and solvers
summary: We introduce SymbolicAI, a versatile and modular framework employing a logic-based approach to concept learning and flow management in generative processes. SymbolicAI enables the seamless integration of generative models with a diverse range of solvers by treating large language models (LLMs) as semantic parsers that execute tasks based on both natural and formal language instructions, thus bridging the gap between symbolic reasoning and generative AI.
